description: A broken eyebot.  Much less threatening now that it won't be calling for backup.  Could be gutted for parts.
An inactive eyebot.  Using this item involves turning it on and launching the UAV.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully, the eyebot will then keep watch for intruders.

use_action.friendly_msg: The eyebot hums and takes to the sky.
use_action.hostile_msg: The eyebot beeps disapprovingly and focuses its camera on your face.  Say cheese!
use_action.//: Like most surveillance tech these likely have poor security. Secure the wifi!

description: A broken police bot.  Much less threatening now that it's quiet and still.  Could be gutted for parts.

An inactive police robot.  Using this item involves placing it on the ground and turning it on.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully, the police bot will then identify you as law enforcement, roam around or follow you, and attempt to detain lawbreakers.

use_action.friendly_msg: The police bot rolls into action, ready to pursue criminals.
use_action.hostile_msg: A siren howls and lights flash as the police bot prepares to arrest you!
use_action.//: Wheeled and must be easy-to-use for police deployment

description: A broken miner bot.  Much less threatening now that it's no longer capable of drilling anything.  Could be gutted for parts.
An inactive mining robot.  Using this item involves placing it on the ground and turning it on.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully, the miner bot will respond to future commands.

use_action.friendly_msg: The miner bot whirrs and tunnels into the ground.
use_action.hostile_msg: The miner bot spins out of control and lunges at you.  Make way!
use_action.//: Digging parameters need special attention but no (intentional) lethal weapons

description: A broken riot control bot.  Much less threatening now that it's out of gas.  Could be gutted for parts.
An inactive riot control bot.  Using this item involves placing it on the ground and turning it on.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully, the robot will bring order and peace to the horde.

use_action.friendly_msg: The riot control bot rolls into action.
use_action.hostile_msg: The riot control bot gasses you and approaches with a pair of handcuffs!
use_action.//: Pretty easy but you want to be careful with the gas
